name: MangaDex
description: The world's largest manga aggregator. Free, no CF protection.

name: NovelFull
description: Web novel translations. Returns chapter text (no page images). Cloudflare-protected — requires CloakBrowser.

name: Mangapill
description: Fast manga reader with cover proxy support.

name: nhentai
description: Hentai doujin galleries (English only). Cloudflare-protected — requires CloakBrowser.

name: AsuraScans
description: Popular manhwa scanlation site (AsuraComic). No CF protection.

name: WuxiaWorld
description: Premier English translation site for Chinese web novels. Has official API.

name: Manga18fx
description: Manhwa aggregator with both explicit and non-explicit titles. No CF protection.

name: NovelUpdates
description: Metadata authority for all novel types. Cloudflare-protected — requires CloakBrowser.
